question: Find dents and deformation in this pipeline scan, compute the deviation map, measure ovality, and explain which findings should be treated as engineering-review items.
visualization_request: Build a local bronze/silver/gold pipeline and create a report with a 3D scan view, cross-section view, unwrapped defect map, axial defect profile, ovality profile, dent summary, and a clear engineering review queue.
pipeline_findings: Point cloud has 2160 points with extent [8.0, 2.0, 2.0] mm.
Cleaned point cloud from 2160 to 49 points.
Fitted nominal cylinder radius 125.4647 mm with RMSE 124.5361.
Computed deviation map with minimum radial deviation -124.6057 mm.
Detected severe dent dent_1 with depth 124.6057 mm.
Maximum slice ovality is 0.0008 between 1.6198 and 2.6198 mm.
